top3.sql:
SELECT Phone
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE sa.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL AND sa.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL AND sa.AvgScrWrite IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY (sa.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / sa.enroll12) DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT Phone
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode IN (
    SELECT cds
    FROM satscores
    ORDER BY NumGE1500 DESC
    LIMIT 3
);

SELECT Phone
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE sa.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL AND sa.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL AND sa.AvgScrWrite IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY (sa.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / sa.enroll12) DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT Phone
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode IN (
    SELECT cds
    FROM satscores
    ORDER BY NumGE1500 DESC
    LIMIT 3
);

SELECT Phone
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode IN (
    SELECT cds
    FROM satscores
    ORDER BY CAST(NumGE1500 AS REAL) / NULLIF(enroll12, 0) DESC
    LIMIT 3
);

SELECT Phone
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE sa.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL AND sa.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL AND sa.AvgScrWrite IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY (sa.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / sa.enroll12) DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT Phone
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode IN (
    SELECT cds
    FROM satscores
    ORDER BY NumGE1500 DESC
    LIMIT 3
);

SELECT s.Phone
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
ORDER BY CAST(sa.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / NULLIF(sa.enroll12, 0) DESC
LIMIT 3;

final.sql:
SELECT Phone
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sa ON s.CDSCode = sa.cds
WHERE sa.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL AND sa.AvgScrMath IS NOT NULL AND sa.AvgScrWrite IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY (sa.NumGE1500 * 1.0 / sa.enroll12) DESC
LIMIT 3;
